notes: All three factual claims verified against multiple independent sources. (1) The 2026 FIFA World Cup final IS scheduled for July 19, 2026 at MetLife Stadium (East Rutherford, NJ) — confirmed by FIFA.com, Wikipedia, and MetLife Stadium's own event page. (2) The tournament IS co-hosted by the United States, Canada, and Mexico — confirmed by FIFA.com and Britannica. (3) This IS the first World Cup to feature 48 teams, expanded from the previous 32 — confirmed by Wikipedia and Britannica. Minor caveat: FIFA refers to MetLife Stadium as 'New York New Jersey Stadium' during the tournament due to sponsorship policies, but the venue and location are correct. The source Twitter handle '@WorldCupBuzz' could not be independently verified as authoritative, but the factual content is accurate.
